Name: GENERATOR_REGIST_PARAM
Description: Defines enemy registration data used by generators, including logic configuration, startup behavior, and memory slots for runtime parameters.

Fields.Name: Registered Enemy
Fields.Description: ID of the enemy entity to be spawned or registered.

Fields.Name: Overall Logic ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the upper-tier AI or behavior logic.

Fields.Name: Detailed Logic ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the lower-tier AI or behavior logic.

Fields.Name: Startup State Type
Fields.Description: Determines the initial state or behavior mode when the generator activates.

Fields.Name: Otherworld Generation
Fields.Description: Enables spawning in an alternate or special world context.

Fields.Name: Memory Block 1
Fields.Description: General-purpose runtime memory slot for generator logic.

Fields.Description: General-purpose runtime memory slot for generator logic.
